description: SNIBE MAGLUMI X3 ASTM E1394 result upload, graduated from the LIS-75 bench capture: real H/P/O/R/L records for three confirmed immunoassays (FT3, FT4 II, TSH II), normalized to LOINC/UCUM per the Pinote QA-approved dictionary (LIS-38 AC1). Combines the three real single-assay envelopes captured back-to-back on the bench into one multi-order transmission; every record field (codes, units, ranges, flags, the R.13 completion timestamp) is verbatim from the capture.

source.note: Real X3 firmware bytes, not a SnibeLis capture -- the analyzer connects directly (H-record sender 'Maglumi X3'), no SnibeLis intermediary software observed anywhere on the bench. The chassis was disconnected during capture (a stored-result replay via the analyzer's own 'Result' tab -> LIS Online button), so this is genuine firmware-generated ASTM, not a fabricated payload. The real wire sends each assay as its own full ENQ/STX/H/P/O/R/L/ETX/EOT session (three separate envelopes, ~90s to 0s apart); this fixture combines their O/R record content into one multi-order transmission (O.2 sequence 1/2/3) for conformance-test convenience -- every field value, the completion-timestamp position (R.13, not the KB-documented R.12 off-by-one), and the record shape (no priority/action-code fields, one assay per O-record) are unchanged from the real bytes. The P-record on this wire carries no patient identifier at all ('P|1' only) -- only a specimen/sample id in O.3, redacted here to 'PATIENT-REDACTED-1' per the runbook (the original field carried a real patient name). Remaining panel assays (AFP, CEA, ...) stay synthetic/unmapped pending their own bench capture.

terminology.note: LIS-75 bench-verified MAGLUMI X3 wire codes, Pinote QA-approved LOINC/UCUM mapping (LIS-38 AC1) -- FT3, FT4 II and TSH II only (the three assays captured on the bench). Codes come solely from this channel block (bridge contract: codeToLoinc is per-analyzer data, never a shared seed). The remaining panel (AFP, CEA, ...) graduates from synthetic seed to real code/unit as each is captured; see the snibelis-maglumi-x3-result-unmapped fixture for the unmapped-review contract.
